★ NEW CLIENT OFFER

Sign On and Get 6 Months of TV Commercial Production, Free.

When you start with Total Concepts, we write, shoot, and produce your TV commercial at no extra cost for your first 6 months. You get a broadcast-ready spot to run across TV and streaming, included.

Most agencies charge thousands for production alone. We hand it to you so your campaign starts working faster.

What We Do

Everything you need to get your business seen, under one roof.

Radio

On-air spots across the region's top stations, plus the production to back them. We've built relationships with the tri-state's media outlets for decades, so your buy goes further.

TV & Streaming

Reach audiences on broadcast TV and connected/streaming platforms with data-driven placement. Production included for new clients, see the offer above.

Print & Direct Mail

Newspaper, magazine, and targeted direct mail that puts your message in the right hands, in the ZIP codes that matter.

Social

Paid social campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, and beyond, built to turn scrollers into customers.

one roof

Don't know the right mix? That's our job. We build the plan, place the media, and handle production so you don't have to juggle five vendors.

PACKED THE HOUSE
Who We Serve

Built for Local Businesses and Event Promoters Who Want Real Reach.

We work with Greater Fort Wayne and tri-state businesses across every category, from local service companies and retailers to the region's biggest events. If you've seen a bridal show, RV or boat expo, circus, or fair advertised around here, there's a good chance we put it in front of the crowd.

Events we promote
Bridal Spectacular Shipshewana on the Road Indy RV Expo Fort Wayne Boat Show Mizpah Shrine Circus DeKalb County Fair

Sample Work

See what your ads could look like.

Not sure what your campaign would look or sound like? Here's the kind of work we create, and where it can run across the region. When you sign on, we build your real version.

● Radio

Spots written to sell, produced in-house, and placed where your customers are already listening.

:30 · PROBLEM / SOLUTION
Home Service

"It's 95 degrees and your AC just quit. Again. Stop pouring money into a unit that's done. [Client] has same-day install and a 10-year warranty. Call now. Cool house, no drama."

:30 · EVENT PROMO
Bridal Show

"Brides, this is your weekend. The Bridal Spectacular returns to the Memorial Coliseum Saturday and Sunday. Hundreds of vendors, runway shows, and giveaways. Say yes to the dress, and the whole day."

:30 · RETAIL OFFER
Dealership Sale

"Three days only. The Memorial Day Blowout. Zero down, zero percent for 60 months, and we'll beat any written offer. Over 300 vehicles ready to roll. Hurry, when they're gone, they're gone."

Where it runs: Top AM/FM stations across every format (country, rock, top 40, sports, news/talk), plus streaming audio (Spotify, Pandora, iHeartRadio) and local podcasts.

● TV

Broadcast-ready spots, included free for your first 6 months as a new client.

:30
Brand Story / Testimonial

A customer or owner on camera tells why people choose you. Warm, credible, memorable.

:30
Event / Attraction Promo

Fast cuts, energy, and big on-screen dates. Built to drive a crowd to a show, expo, or fair.

:30
Direct-Response Sale

Offer-forward with a strong call to action and end card. Built to make the phone ring this week.

Where it runs: Local ABC, NBC, CBS, FOX and CW affiliates, local cable, and Connected TV / streaming (Hulu, YouTube TV, Roku, Sling, Peacock). Target by ZIP and household.

● Social

Thumb-stopping creative built for the feed, targeted to the people most likely to buy.
